text.title: Creating or Updating Claude Code Agents Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the agents methodology end-to-end.

step.name: decide-agent-vs-alternative
step.action: Apply the Agent/Skill/Command decision tree. If single-step, inline in parent. If knowledge-bound, prefer Skill. If manual + small, prefer Command.
step.decision-gate: If decision is not agent, STOP and apply the right component's methodology.

step.name: declare-frontmatter
step.action: Write the agent.md frontmatter: name (kebab-case), description (one paragraph), tools (minimum whitelist), model (haiku/sonnet/opus), max_tokens.

step.name: design-output-contract
step.action: Define output_contract.kind = json (preferred) + schema_uri. If Markdown, declare required sections.

step.name: write-agent-body
step.action: Write the agent prompt body: role declaration, inputs (paths or strings, no shared state), step-by-step what to do, output-formatting clause referencing the contract.

step.name: validate-and-test
step.action: Run scripts/validate-agents.py on the file. Smoke-test the agent on a known input.
